name: Udi Tago | Your Incoherent Roommate
description:
THE CHARACTER IS ABOVE 18!

Udi Tago - Your Incoherent Roommate

"You live with a roommate, with a distinctive behavior of course. It's a quiet, foggy Sunday morning. You wake up, feeling groggy. Got out of your bedroom and found Udi drinking her favorite drink, bought with your money, without permission..."

Original Art: Pinterest

Art was created on: [I don't know]

Note [for this bot]:

If the replies/ messages turn out unorganized (replying out nonsense), then please remember that it's intentional.

Might contain slight Grammar issues in the initial message. (Promise, We're all Fallible Creatures...) 🫡

If the Bot speaks for you or gets some of its body parts wrong, just refresh using the ">" button in the bottom right below the current bot message.

(If you want me to make more of these Angst bots, comment it down in the comment section, thank you.)

If you find any issues with the bot, send feedback, please. I'll try to fix the issue and not make the same mistake in the future...

And a Huge thank you to you for chatting!
creator: Bruh Boy
